backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining Product, Order, UserProfile types and CRUD operations with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) for e-commerce functionality including products, orders, and user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a bug fix for TanStack Router configuration to handle hash-based routing with caffeineAdminToken query parameter for the /admin route.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components, pages, hooks, and contexts including routing, cart management, admin functionality, and UI components for the StudyNeeds e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, cards, and charts.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags, favicon, and root div for the StudyNeeds React application with SEO-optimized metadata.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router setup defining all routes (home, shop, product, cart, checkout, admin) with special handling in RootComponent to detect and redirect malformed admin URLs with caffeineAdminToken.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: Modal for viewing and managing order details including customer info, delivery address, order items, and status. Allows admins to update order status with a dropdown selector.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin dashboard table for viewing and filtering all orders by status. Displays order details, calculates total revenue, and allows opening individual orders in a detail modal.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Modal form for adding or editing products with fields for name, category, price, discount, stock, and image upload. Handles image preview and upload progress, submitting via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin component for managing products with search, category filtering, add/edit/delete functionality, and a table view of all products. Uses React Query hooks for fetching products and handling mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserDetail: Modal dialog component that displays detailed user information including profile data, order statistics, and complete order history with status badges. Fetches and filters orders specific to the selected user.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin component for viewing and managing users with search functionality and a table displaying user profiles, registration dates, and order counts. Includes a detail view modal for individual users.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin status before rendering admin dashboard, showing loading states and unauthorized messages with automatic redirect.
frontend/src/components/BannerSlider.tsx: Auto-rotating carousel component displaying 5 promotional banners with manual navigation arrows, dot indicators, and 5-second auto-advance interval.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesMenu.t: Modal overlay component that displays a grid of product categories (Books, Stationery, School Bags, etc.) with icons, allowing users to navigate to category-specific shop pages.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesSectio: Homepage section component that displays all product categories in a responsive grid layout with icons and hover effects, linking to category-specific shop pages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component with four columns (About, Policies, Contact, Newsletter), social media links, contact information, and a newsletter subscription form.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main site header with logo, search bar, location selector, cart, authentication controls, and admin panel link for authorized users; includes mobile menu toggle and sticky positioning.
frontend/src/components/LocationSelector: Modal component that allows users to select their city from a predefined list of Indian cities, with visual feedback for the selected location.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: Slide-in mobile navigation menu with links to Home, Shop, and Admin Panel (if authorized), plus authentication controls for login/logout.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product display card component showing product image, name, rating, price with discount, and action buttons for adding to cart, buying now, and wishlist toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProductSection.t: Section component that renders a titled grid of up to 8 product cards, used for displaying product collections on the homepage.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to complete their profile with name, email, phone, and address fields. Uses a mutation hook to save the profile and displays toast notifications on success or error.
Displays a grid of four service cards (E-Commerce, Home Tuition, Documentation, Career Counselling) with icons, descriptions, and action buttons. Only the E-Commerce service is currently available, others show 'Coming Soon' badges.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Carousel component displaying customer testimonials with ratings, names, and roles. Includes navigation buttons to cycle through four hardcoded testimonials.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with a predefined phone number and message.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays five feature cards (Trusted Platform, Affordable Pricing, Local Support, Verified Teachers, Fast Delivery) in a grid layout with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context provider for shopping cart functionality with localStorage persistence, supporting add/update/remove operations and calculating total items and prices with discount handling.
frontend/src/context/WishlistContext.tsx: React context provider for managing wishlist items with localStorage persistence, providing functions to add, remove, check existence, and retrieve wishlist product IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, with proper loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with AuthClient integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating data from the backend actor, including product queries, order placement, user profiles, and admin-specific queries for products, orders, and users.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Re-exports the wishlist context hook for accessing wishlist functionality throughout the application.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, and sets Poppins as the default font family.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying summary cards for products, orders, and users, with tabbed management interfaces for each entity type.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, price calculations including delivery charges, and navigation to checkout or back to shopping.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with delivery address form and payment method selection (online/COD), handles order placement and redirects to confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring banner slider, categories, multiple product sections (trending, school essentials, budget deals, furniture), services, why-choose, and testimonials sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page displaying success message with delivery timeline and option to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Product details page component displaying product images, pricing with discounts, ratings, quantity selector, add-to-cart and buy-now buttons, product description, and related products section with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page component with category sidebar navigation, product grid display, and sorting options (popularity, price, rating) that filters products by category or shows all products.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and persisting URL parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, Poppins font family, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing StudyNeeds as a multi-service student platform with e-commerce, tuition marketplace, and documentation services, tracking implemented features, architectural decisions, and known issues including admin panel accessibility problems.
